What is the average salary for Graduate Data Analyst?

Average salary per year
£28,999
The average salary for a Graduate Data Analyst is £28,999. Graduate Data Analyst salaries range from £20,999 to £32,499.

Frequently Asked Questions

How many Graduate Data Analyst jobs are available on CWJobs?
There are 412 Graduate Data Analyst jobs available on CWJobs right now.
What other similar jobs are there to Graduate Data Analyst jobs?
As well as Graduate Data Analyst jobs, you can find Data Analyst, Cyber Security, Junior Data Analyst, amongst many others.
Which places are popular for Graduate Data Analyst jobs?
People who are interested in Graduate Data Analyst jobs prefer to look in Shirebrook, Bulls Bridge, Heavygate.
Which industry do Graduate Data Analyst jobs belong to?
Graduate Data Analyst jobs are part of the Consulting industry.
